description: Order of payment in Arabic script. The judge (al-dayyān) is asked to pay 4 dinars to the bearer Bū l-ʿIzz. Dated Monday the 20th of Shaʿbān. On verso there are additional notes/accounts. See T-S AS 179.212 (PGPID 36725) and the related orders listed there.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
